name: zebra-image
description: Turn ordinary images into black-and-white zebra-style images from an agent workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Apply a zebra stripe effect to an input image.
interface.longDescription: Zebra Image adds a reusable agent skill for converting common image files into black-and-white zebra-style PNG outputs with a small local demo script.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use zebra-image to turn an input picture into a zebra-style image.
